_meta.cadence_confidence: high = sheet states frequency; medium = sheet blank, inferred from roster/calendar; low = guess
_meta.hardness_tags: HARD=must respect; SOFT=preference; FLEX=movable; FLEX+=ultra-flex gap-filler
_meta.base_home: 3885 SW 114th Court, Ocala 34481 (Paul's home, rural SW Marion County)
_meta.base_anchor: No separate anchor needed: home sits adjacent to the SW Ocala / On Top of the World client cluster (the densest in the book). Use home for drive-time math; SW cluster is the launch/return cluster; Chester Weber (right by base, flexible day, fixed 12pm) is the natural first-stop anchor. NE/NW/SE days commute into the city.
_meta.base_note: Chester 'right by base' is consistent: his plus 5PG7+H6F is in the same SW area as home.
